caption: A man wearing a large, grey, pointed wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a small bow tie and suspenders. He sits before a professional microphone, with a wall of framed photographs behind him. To his left, a logo featuring a microphone and the text "STUDIO PODCAST" is visible, while to his right, red text reads "OSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and slightly tilting his head as he interacts with someone off-camera. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, and he gestures with his hand toward the bottom left of the frame in the final moments. The background and studio equipment remain static as the man continues his conversation.
